description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch. Use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11 on an ubuntu-latest environment. The workflow should set up PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Scylla, install Poetry and dependencies, and run various unit tests with coverage reporting, finally uploading the coverage to Codecov.
